legacy.descriptionHtml:
Twentyseventh

It’s been a while since I did a doubleheader. So there you have it, fourteen instead of the usual seven. For an exceptional week, and everything else that goes with it.

Monday Music Mix: 27

Album art featuring work by Raphël Vicenzi

Tracklist:

  1. Longwave - Tidal Wave
  2. JJ - Beautiful Life
  3. Arcade Fire - Abraham’s Daughter
  4. Chairlift - Guilty As Charged
  5. Dntel - Bright Night
  6. Little Scream - The Heron and the Fox
  7. Múm - Don’t Be Afraid, You Have Just Got Your Eyes Closed
  8. Van She - Idea Of Happiness
  9. Thievery Corporation - The Time We Lost Our Way (featuring Loulou)
  10. Ramona Falls - Spore
  11. Hot Chip - Flutes
  12. Cats On Fire - A Few Empty Waves
  13. Lower Dens - Brains
  14. Radical Face - Welcome Home

* Tracks in blue indicate my favourites

Download album | Mirror
